text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for final race of the Classic Triple Crown.
The audience at Kyoto Racecourse has high
hopes for the Kikuka Sho and the mood is festive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And the hottest topic of conversation of all is...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh. So this Air Shakur is pretty strong?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Is she! She's a notch above the others in her year.
But I guess you could also say that the others just
aren't up to snuff.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You reckon she'll be able to represent her whole
year? That's pretty impressive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through consistent training, we've successfully
raised Air Shakur's stats to meet the parameters
necessary for her to win the Kikuka Sho. But still...
choice_data_list: I wonder how this race will turn out?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The calculations Parcae gave me before aren't
applicable anymore, after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I can do is keep all the different
scenarios and variables we ran simulations of in
mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Like the state of the track, the condition of my
opponents, mid-race developments... I've
memorized about a hundred combinations to be
safe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I think that should be enough. It's my way of
dealin' with the unknown.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My fate's already changed. I'm not gonna keep
goin' down the path that was chosen for me. I'm
gonna choose the route that'll lead me to victory
for myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely find my way there. This won't be my
last time in the spotlight.
